ast.name: setButtonText
ast.source: Once you've signed in, click here to continue

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Enable or disable the inline copilot. This will also start the copilot server.
ast.target: 启用或禁用内联副驾驶。这也将启动副驾驶服务器。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: The path to your node binary (at least Node v22). This is used to run the copilot server.
ast.target: 您的Node二进制文件路径（至少Node v22）。用于运行副驾驶服务器。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: The delay in milliseconds before generating suggestions. Default is 500ms.
ast.target: 生成建议前的延迟（毫秒）。默认为500毫秒。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Only show suggestions when the 'request' keybinding is pressed. Default is false.
ast.target: 仅在按下“请求”快捷键时显示建议。默认为 false。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Only show suggestions when the cursor is inside a code block. Default is false.
ast.target: 仅在光标位于代码块内时显示建议。默认为 false。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: If enabled, certain settings (only the node path for now) will be saved to a separate file. This is useful when using the same vault on multiple devices. Default is false.
ast.target: 启用后，某些设置（目前仅限节点路径）将保存到单独的文件中。当在多个设备上使用同一个保险库时，此功能很有用。默认为 false。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Set up a proxy for the copilot service. Should start with http:// or https://.
ast.target: 为 Copilot 服务设置代理。应以 http:// 或 https:// 开头。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Path to a PEM file containing additional root certificates. This will be set as NODE_EXTRA_CA_CERTS for the Copilot agent. Leave blank to use system defaults.
ast.target: 包含额外根证书的 PEM 文件路径。这将作为 Copilot 代理的 NODE_EXTRA_CA_CERTS 设置。留空则使用系统默认值。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Enable logging for debugging purposes. Logs are written to the console.
ast.target: 启用日志记录以用于调试。日志将写入控制台。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Open the Copilot Chat sidebar automatically when Obsidian loads. Default is true.
ast.target: Obsidian 加载时自动打开 Copilot 聊天侧边栏。默认为 true。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Enable or disable markdown rendering in chat messages. When disabled, messages will be displayed as plain text with basic formatting.
ast.target: 启用或禁用聊天消息中的 Markdown 渲染。禁用后，消息将以纯文本形式显示，并带有基本格式。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: When enabled, pressing Enter will create a new line and Shift+Enter will send the message. By default, Enter sends the message and Shift+Enter creates a new line.
ast.target: 启用后，按 Enter 将创建新行，按 Shift+Enter 将发送消息。默认情况下，按 Enter 发送消息，按 Shift+Enter 创建新行。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Configure the system prompt used for new chat conversations.
ast.target: 配置用于新聊天对话的系统提示。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Custom GitHub Enterprise hostname (e.g. company.ghe.com). Leave blank to use github.com. Changing this requires re-authentication.
ast.target: 自定义 GitHub Enterprise 主机名（例如 company.ghe.com）。留空则使用 github.com。更改此设置需要重新认证。

ast.name: setPlaceholder
ast.source: Enter the path to your node binary.
ast.target: 输入您的 node 二进制文件路径。

ast.name: setPlaceholder
ast.source: Enter a system prompt for Copilot Chat.
ast.target: 为 Copilot 聊天输入系统提示。

ast.name: setTooltip

ast.target: 这将测试路径并验证 node 的版本。

ast.name: setTooltip

ast.target: 请注意，这将在后台启动 Copilot 服务。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Render math in display mode, which puts the math in display style (so \int and \sum are large, for example), and centers the math on the page on its own line.
ast.target: 以显示模式渲染数学公式，这会将数学公式置于显示样式（例如，\\int 和 \\sum 会变大），并将数学公式居中显示在页面的单独行上。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Determines the markup language of the output.

ast.name: description
ast.source: Render display math in leqno style (left-justified tags).
ast.target: 以 leqno 样式（左对齐标签）渲染显示数学公式。

ast.name: description
ast.target: 将显示数学公式左对齐渲染。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Specifies a minimum thickness, in ems, for fraction lines, `\sqrt` top lines, `{array}` vertical lines, `\hline`, `\hdashline`, `\underline`, `\overline`, and the borders of `\fbox`, `\boxed`, and `\fcolorbox`.
ast.target: 指定分数线、`\\sqrt` 顶线、`{array}` 垂直线、`\\hline`、`\\hdashline`、`\\underline`、`\\overline` 以及 `\\fbox`、`\\boxed` 和 `\\fcolorbox` 边框的最小厚度（以 em 为单位）。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Makes \color behave like LaTeX's 2-argument \textcolor, instead of LaTeX's one-argument \color mode change.
ast.target: 使 \\color 的行为类似于 LaTeX 的双参数 \\textcolor，而不是 LaTeX 的单参数 \\color 模式更改。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Turn on strict / LaTeX faithfulness mode, which throws an error if the input uses features that are not supported by LaTeX.
ast.target: 开启严格 / LaTeX 忠实模式，如果输入使用了 LaTeX 不支持的功能，将抛出错误。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Trust the input, enabling all HTML features such as \url.
ast.target: 信任输入，启用所有 HTML 功能，例如 \\url。

ast.name: description
ast.source: If non-zero, all user-specified sizes, e.g. in \rule{500em}{500em}, will be capped to maxSize ems. Otherwise, elements and spaces can be arbitrarily large
ast.target: 如果非零，所有用户指定的大小（例如在 \\rule{500em}{500em} 中）都将被限制为 maxSize em。否则，元素和空间可以任意大。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Limit the number of macro expansions to the specified number, to prevent e.g. infinite macro loops. If set to Infinity, the macro expander will try to fully expand as in LaTeX.
ast.target: 将宏展开次数限制为指定数量，以防止例如无限宏循环。如果设置为 Infinity，宏展开器将尝试像 LaTeX 一样完全展开。

ast.name: message
ast.source:
Warning: No LINE_BREAKS Found.
	This Lexer has been defined to track line and column information,
	But none of the Token Types can be identified as matching a line terminator.
	See https://chevrotain.io/docs/guide/resolving_lexer_errors.html#LINE_BREAKS 
	for details.
ast.target:
警告：未找到 LINE_BREAKS。
	此词法分析器已定义用于跟踪行和列信息，
	但没有任何词法单元类型可被识别为匹配行终止符。
	详情请参见 https://chevrotain.io/docs/guide/resolving_lexer_errors.html#LINE_BREAKS 
	。

ast.name: name
ast.source:
This CSTNode indicates the Parser is in Recording Phase
	See: https://chevrotain.io/docs/guide/internals.html#grammar-recording for details
ast.target: 此 CSTNode 表明解析器处于记录阶段\n\t详情请参见：https://chevrotain.io/docs/guide/internals.html#grammar-recording

ast.name: text
ast.source: When authenticating in Copilot Chat, a personal token will be encrypted and stored as a file in the plugin folder. This file is called `secure-credentials.dat`. It is only decrytable by your machine but you should never share it with anyone.
ast.target: 在 Copilot Chat 中进行身份验证时，个人令牌将被加密并作为文件存储在插件文件夹中。此文件名为 `secure-credentials.dat`。它只能由您的机器解密，但您绝不应与任何人分享。
